author: Shauna
body: Soon is not soon enough. Love the falsetto, too.

author: Porque Nodejas Dewebear
body:
Well it looks like lipsync… anyway I saw his performance @ Conan & it’s worthy of a better job with these supposed-to-be-viral videos from guys-who-should-look-like-real deal.

Go Allen change that director!
